[2021-09-08 20:07] silentslayers: Just because you’re buying Hellhounds doesn’t mean the inflation is hell hound inflation
[2021-09-08 20:08] silentslayers: For example, let’s say you buy zemora in a set that’s very very clearly not zemora, because you can get rushed down. Clearly the inflation was then not zemora inflation
[2021-09-08 20:09] silentslayers: The best definition is always how good is gold now compared to gold in the future. This definition takes into account what your opponent can do too. Which is why when the game gets very fast paced because opponent has lots of attack inflation is high

[2021-09-11 04:15] pikachumemes. (Pikachu Memes): vacation penalty doesnt make sense for a game with no activity
[2021-09-11 04:15] pikachumemes. (Pikachu Memes): not sure what the vacation penalty is trying to achive
[2021-09-11 04:17] pikachumemes. (Pikachu Memes): for what it's worth, penalty is 225 pts
[2021-09-11 04:17] pikachumemes. (Pikachu Memes): top5 rn is 2050? so you'd have to be 2275
[2021-09-11 04:18] pikachumemes. (Pikachu Memes): it's really sad that we dont get to see how high ppl like wonderboat really are, if he's really 2350+ (wow) or if he has played games recently
[2021-09-11 04:20] silentslayers: I chipped away at my vacation penalty today. I was like 2250 for a while, 2260 right now
[2021-09-11 04:21] silentslayers: I just dislike how dishonest it is
[2021-09-11 04:21] silentslayers: If I'm like 5 games away from getting it all gone, then I might be like 2100
[2021-09-11 04:21] silentslayers: It's easy to think "Wow he had a really bad streak" or washed up or w/e
[2021-09-11 04:21] silentslayers: If you're 15 games away (full vacation) it's at least a bit obvious you just add 225 if you're familiar with their typical ELO
[2021-09-11 04:22] silentslayers: In general it's just a terrible idea without an asterik or hovering to see true ELO etc
[2021-09-11 04:22] silentslayers: Honestly it really bugs me how dishonest it is without the asterik or hover etc
[2021-09-11 04:24] silentslayers: I dont care about the actual view that ppl think of me that much, it's mostly just the principle that it is implemented this way
[2021-09-11 04:24] silentslayers: It's supposed to measure skill
[2021-09-11 04:24] silentslayers: Too bad it's lying anywhere between 0-225 at any given time

[2021-09-11 06:55] silentslayers: yeah you cant win every set. some sets are so insanely player favored
[2021-09-11 06:56] silentslayers: tbh theres lots of egregious units and common combos on ladder atm
[2021-09-11 06:56] silentslayers: When I play good players it can feel very RNG
[2021-09-11 06:56] silentslayers: unless its a complicated or slow set
[2021-09-11 06:56] silentslayers: Mostly notice that type of thing vs jamberine
[2021-09-11 06:56] silentslayers: we both know the punishes and whos favored
[2021-09-11 06:57] silentslayers: the game needed more new units and balance patches and content etc
[2021-09-11 06:57] silentslayers: its too easy to know too much about the current units
[2021-09-11 06:57] silentslayers: So unfortunately getting too good at the game while it was a fun journey does make the game more stale
[2021-09-11 06:58] silentslayers: And since the game is basically never developed ever again... :FeelsBadMan:
